labels.PROVED_LEAN: Machine-checked only when tied to Lean source and current build evidence.
labels.VERIFIED_TEST: Engineering regression evidence, not a formal proof.
labels.REFUTED: Counterexample exists and must be preserved.
labels.PARTIAL: Some source-bound evidence exists but release gate is incomplete.
labels.CANDIDATE: Proposed by model, human, or script; not reasoning-eligible.

reasoning_eligible_default: PROVED_LEAN or verified source-bound fact only; LLM candidate is excluded.
